summary: Excellent matrix recording captures an innovative second‑set brimming with standout Dark Star, Attics of My Life and Fire On The Mountain.
review: The Tobin matrix blend delivers crystal‑clear soundboard detail while preserving the ambience of the audience, making this one of the best‑sounding releases for the date. Fans rave about a wildly inventive second set that feels both rehearsed and spontaneous, highlighted by a mesmerizing Dark Star and an emotionally charged Attics of My Life. Jerry Garcia’s guitar work is described as timeless and hypnotic, even if his vocal on Fire On The Mountain slipped a bit.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed five‑star reviews praise both the performance (innovative set, standout jams) and the high‑quality matrix recording; a single low‑star review is ambiguous but does not outweigh the strong consensus.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Soundboard tracks are crisp and clear; the audience bleed adds atmosphere without muddying detail. Reviewers note this is likely the best free download of this date.

show_quality.setlist_flow: An unconventional, highly improvisational second set that feels both planned and spontaneous; the band stays fired‑up throughout, delivering a rare, innovative sequence praised as one of the era’s best.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Praised for mesmerizing guitar tone, classic "Wolf" sound, flawless timing and technique; even when his vocals slipped on Fire On The Mountain his playing remained stellar.
